description: Verso: Legal document. Appointment of a general administrator of the qodesh, ca. 1150. Copy of a decision taken in the court presided over by Nagid Shemuel b. Hananya by which Yesha'yahu ha-Levi is appointed general administrator of the properties belonging to the qodesh. After an enumeration of different kinds of property, the decision stresses the full prerogratives and the immunity of the appointee from any interference with his activities by the court, including Ḥiyyā b. Yiṣḥaq (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 259 #49)
description_he: שטר משפטי: מינוי מנהל כללי של ההקדש, כ-1150. בבית דין הנגיד שמואל בן חנניה נוּנה ישעיהו הלוי מנהל כללי של נכסי ההקדש, עם חסינות מוחלטת מהתערבות בית הדין.
